title: Segment Anything (SA-1B) Interactive Segmentation
description: Interactive image segmentation annotation. Annotators draw segmentation masks (polygons) and bounding boxes around all distinct objects in images, following the Segment Anything Model (SAM) annotation protocol.
citation:
